findings.title: Trial balance unavailable
findings.message: QuickBooks did not return a trial balance report for this scan.
findings.recommendation: Reconnect QuickBooks and rerun the scan, or export a trial balance manually for reconciliation.

recommendations: Review warnings with an accountant or PreconFin migration specialist.
Import into a Xero demo organization first, then reconcile AR, AP, bank, and retained earnings before go-live.
